title: Maze Product Outcomes, Repository Baseline, Accessibility, and Evidence · Code Recall
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs maze product outcomes, repository baseline, accessibility, and evidence from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for player, repository, accessibility, and evidence charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Define player, task, puzzle rules, success, failure, session length, and observable value before selecting algorithms.
Inspect revision, status, environment, dependencies, licenses, existing tests, and recovery anchors before changing the project.
Record keyboard, pointer, vision, color, motion, timing, cognition, text, and assistive-technology needs as design inputs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Scope Transfer
steps.instruction:
review case — A review puzzle team handles case 8808 during a low-vision player session. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the maze charter on player value, repository evidence, accessibility, and honest native limits; resource use must remain below an explicit budget; then inject one invalid wall, stale callback, or corrupted field and reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: State which claims browser models can establish and which require a controlled native desktop transfer.

lines.label: assumption

steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Scope Transfer: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review puzzle team handles case 5379 during a corrupted-state recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the maze charter on player value, repository evidence, accessibility, and honest native limits; the player cannot rely on color or animation; then replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: State which claims browser models can establish and which require a controlled native desktop transfer.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Scope Transfer.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Scope Transfer, keep Scope Transfer connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: State which claims browser models can establish and which require a controlled native desktop transfer.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Scope Transfer, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Scope Transfer precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Scope Transfer, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A review puzzle team handles case 5379 during a corrupted-state recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the maze charter on player value, repository evidence, accessibility, and honest native limits; the player cannot rely on color or animation; then replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: State which claims browser models can establish and which require a controlled native desktop transfer.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Scope Transfer, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: Pyodide behavior proves Tkinter behavior on every desktop.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using state and claims plus specific case evidence.
